summary: Iteration 234 - SuanpanMixer Decomposition & EventBus Priority Queue Verification Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All decomposed components working correctly. The SuanpanMixer.js decomposition into SuanpanCore.js, SuanpanSovereign.js, and SuanpanVfx.js is successful with no regressions. EventBus Priority Queue with 3 levels (critical/experience/background), backpressure, concurrency limits, and requestIdleCallback scheduling is implemented in SovereignContext.js.

issues: Trial Graduation modal blocks interaction on first visit - user must dismiss it. This is expected behavior from iteration 232.

critical_code_review_comments: SuanpanMixer.js correctly imports from SuanpanCore.js (TRACK_TYPE_META, SUB_COLORS, TIER_DISPLAY, SuanpanSource, TrackRow)
SuanpanMixer.js correctly imports from SuanpanSovereign.js (SpeedBridgeModal, BonusPackCard, RecommendationCard)
SovereignContext.js correctly implements EventBus class with subscribe/publish methods
SovereignContext.js correctly implements Priority Queue with 3 levels: critical (0), experience (1), background (2)
SovereignContext.js correctly implements FRAME_BUDGET_MS = 12 for staying under 16ms frame budget
SovereignContext.js correctly implements requestIdleCallback scheduling for non-critical tasks
SovereignContext.js correctly implements NPU burst mode via setNpuBurst() function
SovereignContext.js correctly exports enqueue, setNpuBurst, getQueueStats in addition to previous exports
SuanpanMixer.js correctly uses useSovereign() to access enqueue and publishEvent
React hook warnings in SuanpanCore.js and SuanpanMixer.js are non-critical (missing dependencies)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with purchased thinking_feed unit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 234 verified the SuanpanMixer.js decomposition into 3 domain files: (1) SuanpanCore.js - Foundation math, constants (TRACK_TYPE_META, SUB_COLORS, TIER_DISPLAY, PHI, GOLDEN_SNAPS), SuanpanSource, KeyframeLane, TrackRow components. (2) SuanpanSovereign.js - SpeedBridgeModal (4 tiers), BonusPackCard, RecommendationCard. (3) SuanpanVfx.js - SacredAssemblyLoader, LightTrailCanvas, BloomGlow. Also verified EventBus Priority Queue upgrade in SovereignContext.js with 3 priority levels (critical:0, experience:1, background:2), CONCURRENCY_LIMITS, FRAME_BUDGET_MS, requestIdleCallback scheduling, and NPU burst mode. All mixer panels working: Sources, Suanpan (abacus with frequency calculation), Packs (BonusPackCard, RecommendationCard), DJ Auto (6 wellness goals), Templates, Recording (camera/mic controls), AI Generation (prompt input, tier comparison). Command Mode (Ctrl+K) working with context label, tier badge, input field, Orchestrate button, quick suggestions. Sovereign Architecture page (/sovereign) loads with 4 tabs: Overview, Compare Tiers, Cross-Tier Shop, Glass Box.

decomposition_suanpan_core.details: SuanpanCore.js exports TRACK_TYPE_META, SUB_COLORS, TIER_DISPLAY, PHI, GOLDEN_SNAPS, SuanpanSource, KeyframeLane, TrackRow

eventbus_priority_queue.details: SovereignContext.js implements Priority Queue with 3 levels, CONCURRENCY_LIMITS, FRAME_BUDGET_MS, requestIdleCallback

eventbus_npu_burst_mode.details: SovereignContext.js implements setNpuBurst() for backpressure control

mixer_page_loads.details: Mixer page (/suanpan) loads with header, transport bar, track list, empty state buttons

sources_panel.details: Sources panel opens with phonic tones, mantras, ambience sources

suanpan_panel.details: Suanpan abacus panel opens with frequency calculation (528.0 Hz default)

packs_panel.details: Packs panel opens with BonusPackCard and RecommendationCard rendering

dj_auto_panel.details: Auto-compose DJ panel opens with wellness goal cards

templates_panel.details: Templates panel opens with template cards (Morning Ritual, Quick Calm, etc.)

recording_panel.details: Recording panel opens with Camera/Mic controls, quality options

ai_generation_panel.details: AI Generation panel opens with prompt input, duration selector, tier comparison

command_mode_ctrl_k.details: Ctrl+K opens Command Mode modal with context label, tier badge, input, Orchestrate button

command_mode_trigger_button.details: Command Mode trigger button (Zap) visible in bottom-right

sovereign_page_4_tabs.details: /sovereign page loads with 4 tabs: Overview, Compare Tiers, Cross-Tier Shop, Glass Box

backend_mixer_subscription.details: GET /api/mixer/subscription returns tier config, AI credits, speed bonus

backend_sovereign_status.details: GET /api/sovereign/status returns tier, capabilities, active units

backend_sovereign_command.details: POST /api/sovereign/command returns thinking chain with agents
